svg.title: GCP-native logistics data pipeline architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end data flow from warehouse CSV uploads through GCP ingestion, processing, storage, and Looker Studio dashboards

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about how warehouses upload CSVs to GCS')
sendPrompt('What is Cloud Storage used for in this pipeline and what are the tradeoffs?')
sendPrompt('How does Cloud Scheduler trigger the Dataflow job hourly?')
sendPrompt('Why use Dataflow for processing instead of Cloud Functions or Dataproc?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cloud Function do in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why is Pub/Sub included and what problem does it solve?')
sendPrompt('How is BigQuery structured for this logistics use case — what datasets and tables?')
sendPrompt('What transformations turn raw BigQuery data into the curated layer?')
sendPrompt('Why archive the raw CSVs in GCS and what lifecycle policy should we use?')
sendPrompt('How do you connect Looker Studio to BigQuery and make dashboards mobile-friendly?')
sendPrompt('How should IAM roles and Secret Manager be configured for this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What should we monitor and alert on in this GCP pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How do executives access the Looker Studio dashboards on mobile?')

svg.text: Click any box to explore that component
